ddls:
CREATE TABLE "furniture_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each furniture item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the furniture item */,
  "brochure_number" TEXT /* Brochure number for the item */,
  "num_of_seats" INTEGER /* Number of seats the furniture item has */,
  "num_of_pieces" INTEGER /* Number of pieces in the furniture set */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material used for the item */,
  "colour_id" INTEGER /* ID of the colour of the item */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the item in dollars */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the item (e.g., LxWxH) */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the item in kilograms */,
  "style" TEXT /* Style of the furniture item */,
  "warranty_period" INTEGER /* Warranty period in months */,
  "is_assembly_required" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if assembly is required */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the item belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_furniture_items_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_furniture_items_colour_id FOREIGN KEY ("colour_id") REFERENCES colours ("colour_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the furniture item sold */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the sale occurred */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of items sold in the transaction */,
  "total_price" TEXT /* Total price of the sale */,
  "discount_applied" TEXT /* Discount applied to the sale */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Current status of the order */,
  "salesperson_id" INTEGER /* ID of the salesperson who handled the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES furniture_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the furniture item */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store */,
  "quantity_on_hand" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item currently in stock */,
  "reorder_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold quantity for initiating a reorder */,
  "last_restock_date" TEXT /* Date when the item was last restocked */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Estimated lead time in days for restocking the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES furniture_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the store */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the store */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store manager */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the store */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "membership_level" TEXT /* Membership level of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer joined */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the material */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the material */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier providing the material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colours" (
  "colour_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each colour */,
  "colour_name" TEXT /* Name of the colour */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the colour */,
  "hex_code" TEXT /* Hexadecimal code for the colour */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("colour_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_history" (
  "price_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price history record */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the furniture item */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date for the price */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date for the price */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the item during this period */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for the price change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_history_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES furniture_items ("item_id")
)
